op_date_1.text: วันที่หนังสือ

root.sql: select sc_mem_m_member_memo.membership_no , pka_com_function.fp_get_member_name(sc_mem_m_member_memo.membership_no)as member_name , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_name , sc_mem_m_member_memo.miss_year + 543 as year_th , pka_com_function.fp_get_month_name((sc_mem_m_member_memo.miss_month)::int)as month_th , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(to_date('!op_date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy'),'dd month')as thai_date , pka_com_function.fp_get_thaidate(to_date('!op_date_1!','dd/mm/yyyy'),'DAY')as thai_day , '!as_text_1!'as text , (select count(*) from sc_mem_m_member_memo member_memo where sc_mem_m_member_memo.miss_month = member_memo.miss_month and sc_mem_m_member_memo.miss_year = member_memo.miss_year)as count_mem from sc_mem_m_member_memo , sc_mem_m_membership_registered , sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group where 1=1 and sc_mem_m_membership_registered.membership_no = sc_mem_m_member_memo.membership_no and sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no = sc_mem_m_membership_registered.member_group_no --and sc_mem_m_member_memo.miss_year = 2025 --and sc_mem_m_member_memo.miss_month = 11 /*WHERE*/ order by sc_mem_m_ucf_member_group.member_group_no
